name: com.nekuzaky.chroma
description: Editor-only Unity extension that color-codes the Hierarchy and Project window: colored banners, gradients, separators, tree guide lines, auto-color rules, child-color inheritance, bookmarks, animated RGB mode, themes (incl. colorblind-safe), custom banner fonts, missing-script warnings, per-row active toggles and component icons, a team convention linter, and build-time stripping. Zero runtime cost.
